creator: reel@sympatico.ca
text:
When doing "make" in /usr/ports/mail/pgp4pine, i get this error:
===>  Building for pgp4pine-1.76
make: don't know how to make ./stamp-h.in. Stop
*** Error code 2
Stop in /usr/ports/mail/pgp4pine.

Fix: 

mv stamp-h stamp-h.in
How-To-Repeat: ===>  Building for pgp4pine-1.76
make: don't know how to make ./stamp-h.in. Stop
*** Error code 2
Stop in /usr/ports/mail/pgp4pine.

do a make
